title: Fomo Kernel Light-Tier Capture Entries
description: Append-only motive/emotion capture for a cadence.tier=light review (issue #237 #4). Not agent narrative prose, so the digit-ban in narrative.schema.json does not apply here. Each entry either attaches a lightweight thesis_decision to an already-established cycle, or — when the cycle has no thesis yet (see review_plan.state_snapshot.missing_thesis_positions) — seeds a minimal inferred thesis, in which case why and exit_trigger become required so the entry is never silently dropped by thesis.reconstruct_states.
